parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ incidentType: 'severe_storm', severity: $json.severity, probability: $json.probability, message: 'Wind gusts: ' + $json.gustsKmh + ' km/h. Rain: ' + $json.totalForecastRainMm + 'mm forecast.', source: 'n8n_severe_storm_monitor', metadata: { windSpeed: $json.windSpeedKmh, gusts: $json.gustsKmh, forecastGusts: $json.maxForecastGusts } }) }}
